title: lobelia nummularioides
intro: Lobelia nummularioides, also known as Chinese lobelia, is a plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia nummularioides include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Lobelia nummularioides is traditionally prepared as a tea or decoction, and its roots are also used to make herbal capsules, which are said to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
